resources.string: Make sure your camera is powered on and in Bluetooth pairing or discovery mode.
1. Turn on Bluetooth on both your iPhone and camera.
2. If the camera is not paired yet, enable pairing mode on the camera before tapping connect.
3. On the camera, open Network/Smartphone settings and enable location information link so GPS data can be received from the phone.
4. Make sure Location Services are enabled on iPhone and this app is allowed to access location.
If this is the first time connecting this camera to your phone, please make sure to enable Bluetooth pairing mode in your camera's settings before continuing. If this is not the case, simply continue
